authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(57) — Hennessey Lake tributaries (Napa Co.)
sources.quotedText: (57) Hennessey Lake tributaries (Napa Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 2 trout. 4 trout in possession.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General provisions for the §7.50(b) special-regulation waters list
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Lake Hennessey — Wikipedia (infobox coordinates sourced from USGS GNIS feature ID 234004, Napa County, CA; used as the anchor coordinate for these tributary mouths, since the reservoir itself is not returned by a direct query of the carto.nationalmap.gov GNIS ArcGIS mirror)
sources.quotedText: Coordinates: 38°28′52″N 122°22′24″W (38.48111, -122.37333). GNIS feature ID: 234004. The file's prior coordinate (-122.3550, 38.5030) was ~2.9km away and unsupported by any GNIS-backed source; corrected to lon -122.3733, lat 38.4811, gnisId 234004.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag limit; 4 trout allowed in possession (this water is an exception to the general §7.50(a) rule limiting possession to one daily bag limit).

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag limit, 4 trout in possession

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
